missionBoundary: This report reconciles the known presidential conversation inventory against schedule and call-log source leads. It does not assert the absence of undiscovered or withheld conversations.

scheduleAndCallFolderLeads.folderTitle: (Soderberg Notes from Bosnia PC Conference Call, July 15, 1995] [empty]
scheduleAndCallFolderLeads.reason: Parallel staff notes for Bosnia Principals/Deputies Committee meetings; compare against Records Management PC/DC files already surfaced in the chronology. Senior NSC policy-file lead likely to carry briefing, options, or decision context around the same events.
scheduleAndCallFolderLeads.onsiteAction: Pull first. Photograph the folder title, withdrawal/redaction sheets, index, all dated notes, and any routing/annotation pages.
scheduleAndCallFolderLeads.sourceNoteLead: Source: William J. Clinton Presidential Library, Clinton Presidential Records, National Security Council, 2013-0185-M, Staff Director-Soderberg, Nancy, OA/ID 1394, folder "(Soderberg Notes from Bosnia PC Conference Call, July 15, 1995] [empty]", finding aid Part 4, p. 75. Folder-level lead; exact title, withdrawal sheets, restriction/declassification markers, document dates, attachments, annotations, and item-level provenance require onsite verification.
